regional_cost_note: Electricians in Napier typically charge $90–$120/hr + GST. Most require a minimum 1-hour callout. After-hours and emergency callouts add $60–$100. Switchboard upgrades start around $1,200–$2,500 + GST depending on size.

businesses.name: PERL Electrical Napier
businesses.known_for: Comprehensive residential, commercial and industrial electrical services with 15+ years Hawke’s Bay experience, including solar, EV charging, CCTV and switchboard upgrades.

businesses.name: Big Spark Electrical + Heat Pumps
businesses.known_for: Heat pump installation and servicing alongside general residential electrical work, operated by a registered electrician with 15+ years experience across Napier and Hawke’s Bay.

businesses.name: Just Electrics
businesses.known_for: Family-owned firm with a 10-person team and 100+ years combined experience, specialising in heating, cooling, solar, EV charging and full residential rewires.

businesses.name: Napier Electric Company
businesses.known_for: Domestic and commercial electrical, data, audio and security installation based in Onekawa, with consistently strong customer reviews for communication and attention to detail.

businesses.name: Reset Electrical
businesses.known_for: Full-service residential and commercial electrician offering new builds, LED upgrades, heat pump installation and 24/7 emergency callouts across Napier and Hastings.

businesses.name: EMF Electrical Ltd
businesses.known_for: Napier’s trusted local electricians for domestic, commercial and industrial work including fault finding, rewiring, fire alarms and data cabling.

businesses.name: Booysen Electrical
businesses.known_for: Licensed electricians with 18 years combined experience specialising in new builds, home automation, CCTV, burglar alarms and access control across Napier and Hastings.
